judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content: a map/flight path diagram with a north arrow, scale, labeled locations, and a sketch; however, Description A omits several specific quoted labels (e.g., 'FLIGHT PATH', 'US P-8A Location 1310Z: 1,4a') and the two inset images described in B.
original_image_tags: Tactical map of the Eastern Mediterranean Sea showing the flight path and sensor tracking data. The map includes a North arrow and a 26 NM scale bar. The following elements are marked:
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A declassified briefing page containing one map-style flight-path diagram and two grayscale infrared image insets, with arrows, numbered markers “1” and “2,” labels including “FLIGHT PATH,” “KTG,” “US P-8A Location,” “U/I OBJ,” “(RUS) INGUL ARS,” and “U/I VESSEL,” plus a north arrow and redacted text blocks.*
